author: y4rr
content: GpuClipTextEncoder closure: 12-layer Transformer (hidden=768, 12 heads, head_dim=64), causal attention mask, QuickGELU MLP, learned position embeddings (77 positions), final LayerNorm. Reused existing ferrotorch-gpu primitives (no new kernels). PASS: cosine_sim=0.999973, max_abs=0.084 (under 0.5 threshold). 0 dropped keys. Larger max_abs than VAE (2.6e-5) because softmax across 77×12×12 accumulates more f32 noise than conv-only paths.
